lines = obs.split('\n')
map_start = None
for i, line in enumerate(lines):
    if '--- MAP ---' in line:
        map_start = i + 1
        break

player_row = None

for row_idx, line in enumerate(map_lines):
    if '@' in line:
        player_col = line.index('@')
        player_row = row_idx
    if '>' in line:
        stairs_col = line.index('>')
        stairs_row = row_idx

print(f"Player: col={player_col}, row={player_row}")
print(f"Stairs: col={stairs_col}, row={stairs_row}")

# Show map with coordinates
for i, line in enumerate(map_lines):
    print(f"{i:2}: {line}")

# Calculate movement needed
col_diff = stairs_col - player_col
row_diff = stairs_row - player_row
print(f"\nNeed to move: col_diff={col_diff}, row_diff={row_diff}")
